abstracts.abstract: This House Concurrent Resolution celebrates the progress of the LGBTQ+ movement and acknowledges the month of June 2026 as LGBTQ+ Pride Month in the State of Delaware.

bill.title: RECOGNIZING JUNE 2026 AS LGBTQ+ PRIDE MONTH IN THE STATE OF DELAWARE.

action.description: Passed By Senate. Votes: 15 YES 2 NO 1 NOT VOTING 3 ABSENT
